label: Wallet Summary
description: KPI strip showing total wallet value, chain selector, and per-token balances across all connected wallets and chains.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary confirmed in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2: requiredEntitlements=['defi-trading']. 0.3: availableOn=['defi']. 0.4: no any or ts-ignore. 0.5: no lib/mocks/ imports in widget file (MOCK_CHAIN_PORTFOLIOS was moved to context in S0.3 commit 8e2007e; knownIssues entry is stale). 0.6: added Skeleton loading guard — shows 4-element skeleton when chainPortfolios and tokenBalances are both empty. 0.7: added 'No chain portfolio data available' empty-state guard on sortedPortfolios.length===0 in Portfolio by chain section (Key Rates section already had empty guard). 0.8: DeFiDataContext is synchronous mock with no error field; useDeFiData() throws when provider missing, caught by global WidgetErrorBoundary (0.1); no additional error UI needed. 0.9: no dead code found.

1.1.note: — widget reads all data via useDeFiData() hook.

1.3.note: — adjustedChainPortfolios memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx). tokenBalances and lendingProtocols already filtered.

1.4.note: — clientIds destructured in context and acknowledged; ChainPortfolio and MOCK_TOKEN_BALANCES have no clientId field on their current shape — full client narrowing deferred to BP-5 schema change. Tracked as known gap.

1.5.note: — strategy filter applied to tradeHistory; chainPortfolios are org-level (not strategy-level).

1.7.note: KNOWN-GAP — reference data in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope, not this task.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

l3.notes: Display-only widget — all agent checks pass. 3.3/3.4 N/A.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch ✓ — display-only wallet balance summary.

4.1.note: No interactive buttons. Display-only balance summary and rate table.

l5.notes: Display-only — no execution flow. L5 agent checks complete.

5.1.note: Target strategies: All DeFi strategies — wallet balance summary is foundational context for all DeFi operations (collateral, available liquidity, token positions).

7.2.note: mockPortfolioUsd() helper defined at line 24 within the widget file — local mock calculation function. Not a fixture import, but computes mock USD portfolio value. Should be moved to a utility or context when real price data is available.

7.3.note: 358 lines — within 500-line limit. Advisory: approaching limit.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: portfolio useMemo([tokenBalances]), metrics useMemo, sortedPortfolios useMemo, totalPortfolioUsd useMemo, keyRateRows useMemo — all deps stable.

l7.notes: 7.2 partial: mockPortfolioUsd is an inline mock calc, not a fixture import. Noted for cleanup when real price API is wired.

keepSeparate.rationale: Wallet summary is a foundational reference widget — distinct from all action widgets.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/fixtures/ (tokenBalances, walletSummary via context) + inline mockPortfolioUsd helper
dataContract.notes: Token balances should poll every 30s. mockPortfolioUsd() at widget:24 is a placeholder — needs real price oracle integration. Portfolio (mock USD) label in KPI strip is intentionally marked mock.

gaps.notes: Portfolio USD value uses mockPortfolioUsd() — no real price oracle. Label 'Portfolio (mock USD)' confirms this.
Key Rates section in wallet summary hardcodes rate data — no live feed wired.

findings.description: Missing loading skeleton — no visual feedback when context data is initializing.
Missing empty state for 'Portfolio by chain' table — no message when sortedPortfolios is empty.
knownIssues entry 'Mock import: MOCK_CHAIN_PORTFOLIOS' was stale — import was already removed from widget file in commit 8e2007e (S0.3 cleanup).
chainPortfolios (MOCK_CHAIN_PORTFOLIOS) passed to context unconditionally — not filtered by org scope. Should return empty array when selected org has no DeFi desk.

Client-level filter not wired in context — scope.clientIds does not narrow any DeFi data. clientIds now destructured and acknowledged; full narrowing requires ChainPortfolio schema to gain a clientId field (BP-5 scope).
Reference/static data (MOCK_CHAIN_PORTFOLIOS, MOCK_TOKEN_BALANCES, treasury, delta snapshots) live in lib/mocks/fixtures/ rather than lib/constants/. Moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

defi-wallet-summary-widget.tsx:24 — mockPortfolioUsd() inline mock calculation function defined in widget file. Not a fixture import but a local mock helper. Needs relocation to utility/context when real price oracle is wired.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro Tailwind utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — adjustedChainPortfolios memo with hasDefiDesk guard; clientIds destructured with known-gap comment
